vision_report.compositional_truth_check: The visual data indicates a critical failure of the expected biome. P1 (String of Nickels), P2 (Mexican Mint), and P4 (Silver Guest) are not identifiable as living specimens. P3 (Pothos) is present but severely compromised.

inventory_reconciliation.P1: Systemic Loss: No plant matter visible in yellow pot.
inventory_reconciliation.P2: Systemic Loss: No plant matter visible in black pot.
inventory_reconciliation.P3: Present: Pothos remains, though health is in decline.
inventory_reconciliation.P4: Systemic Loss: No plant matter visible in black pot.

plant_audit.P1: Empty soil surface; no signs of life.
plant_audit.P2: Empty soil surface; no signs of life.
plant_audit.P3: Pothos specimen shows signs of severe dehydration or necrosis; structural integrity is failing.
plant_audit.P4: Empty soil surface; no signs of life.

biome_observations.soil_texture: Appears dry and compacted across all visible pots.
biome_observations.debris: White rabbit anchor is present in P3, but the surrounding environment shows significant neglect.

temporal_deltas.EARLIEST_to_T-3: Initial state shows bare soil in P1/P2/P4; P3 contains the anchor.
temporal_deltas.T-3_to_T-2: Introduction of a metallic object (spoon) into P1/P2 area; no biological recovery.
temporal_deltas.T-2_to_T-1: Removal of the spoon; continued absence of plant life in P1/P2/P4.
temporal_deltas.T-1_to_CURRENT: Static state; no biological activity or growth detected.

vision_report.visual_health_inference: The biome is effectively dead. The lack of foliage, combined with the static, dry soil conditions, suggests a total collapse of the indoor garden system. P3 is the only remaining occupant and is in a terminal state of decline.

anomalies.intervention: A metal spoon was introduced and subsequently removed between T-3 and T-1.
anomalies.structural: The registry is largely inaccurate as the majority of the plants have been lost.

vision_report.narrative_description: The audit reveals a catastrophic loss of the botanical collection. Aside from the Pothos (P3), which is barely holding on, the pots are devoid of life. The environment is stagnant, and the presence of a spoon in the earlier images suggests an unsuccessful attempt at intervention or maintenance. The biome is currently non-viable.
